summary: Results-driven full-stack engineer with 9+ years designing and shipping production software at scale. Deep expertise in distributed systems, cloud-native architectures, and leading cross-functional teams. Passionate about developer experience, clean APIs, and building products that people actually love to use.

highlights: Architected and led development of a new event-driven payment processing pipeline handling 40M+ transactions/day with 99.999% uptime.
Reduced API latency by 38% through query optimization, connection pooling, and strategic caching with Redis.
Mentored a team of 6 engineers, conducting weekly 1:1s and establishing code quality standards that cut bug rates by 22%.
Drove adoption of internal design system used by 200+ engineers across 12 product teams.
Built real-time availability and pricing engine serving 8M+ requests per day across 190+ countries.
Led migration of monolithic search service to microservices, reducing deployment time from 45 minutes to under 4 minutes.
Collaborated with design and PM to ship host dashboard v2, increasing host engagement by 31%.
Championed accessibility improvements (WCAG 2.1 AA) across 14 core user flows.
Developed data visualization tools for government and healthcare clients processing petabyte-scale datasets.
Built secure ETL pipelines for sensitive data ingestion meeting HIPAA and FedRAMP compliance requirements.
Contributed to open-source internal tooling, gaining 1.2k GitHub stars.

achievements.title: Stripe Hackathon Winner
achievements.description: First place for building an AI-powered fraud detection prototype that reduced false positives by 41%.

achievements.title: ACM ICPC Regional Finalist
achievements.description: Top 5 finish at ACM International Collegiate Programming Contest, Great Lakes Regional.

achievements.title: Open Source Contributor
achievements.description: Active contributor to Angular and TypeScript ecosystems; 3.4k GitHub stars across personal projects.

achievements.title: Published Author
achievements.description: Co-authored 'Scaling Payments Infrastructure' in IEEE Software magazine, vol. 39.

projects.name: Helix — API Gateway Framework
projects.description: Open-source API gateway with built-in rate limiting, auth, and observability. 2.1k stars, used in production by 30+ startups.

projects.name: Prism — Design Token CLI
projects.description: CLI tool for syncing Figma design tokens to code. Automates style generation for Angular, React, and Vue projects.

projects.name: Pulsecheck — Uptime Monitor
projects.description: SaaS uptime monitoring tool with Slack/PagerDuty integration. 400+ active users, profitable since month 3.

employmentGaps.description: Full-time M.S. program at Carnegie Mellon. Focused on machine learning research and published 2 conference papers.
